title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: Tampa is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.29. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, making the heat feel even more intense. 
 The wind speed is at 14.3 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
